houses.name: Witch's House
houses.description: Completed in 1921, it was originally a Hollywood prop created by Harry Oliver, but was relocated to Walden Drive in the 1930's.

houses.name: The Snow White Cottage
houses.description: A handcrafted masterpiece in Olalla, Washington. This home looks like it was pulled from the Disney film 'Snow White', and in fact that movie served as the inspiration for this house.

houses.name: Pink Cottage
houses.description: This house was designed by Hugh Comstock, but built by Thomas M. Browne. It's been renovated recently in the 1980's.

houses.name: Carmel Weavers Studio
houses.description: Ruth Kuster and her fellow weavers requested this Tudor style little studio form Lee Gottfried and it has been moved around Carmel and has served many purposes. It is now the Cottage of Sweets

houses.name: The Hobby House
houses.description: This was a knickknacks and furniture shop owned by Bonnie Lee, and is probably Carmel's most iconic building

houses.name: Storybook House by the Sea
houses.description: A more recent addition, this house is only 450-500 sq. feet, but packs a lot personality into a small space!
